[[File:Koschei the deathless chathead.png|left]]
'''Koschei the deathless''' is a [[Fremennik]] warrior that players must fight during [[The Fremennik Trials]] quest, in order to complete [[Thorvald the Warrior]]'s test of bravery and win his vote. The player must defeat Koschei three times without dying; although they are told they must defeat him to win, defeating him three times is considered enough to win, as the test is of bravery, not strength. Weapons and armour are not allowed within the arena, though the player can optionally bring a [[dramen branch]] and a [[knife]] to make a [[dramen staff]] once inside.

Koschei's [[combat level]] is not shown; however, he will get progressively stronger and his attacks faster each time he is defeated. His max hits are 3 in his first form, 5 in his second, and 7 in his third. Although the fourth form is difficult, with 255 [[Hitpoints]], it is not impossible to defeat him; if he is defeated, he will disappear in a puff of smoke, and the player will be rewarded with a [[Fremennik blade]].

Players can learn more about him from [[Brundt the Chieftain]] and [[Thorvald the Warrior]]. Koschei was discovered floating in frozen waters far from land by a Fremennik raiding party. He had no possessions with him, with his body being mysteriously burnt, and would only mutter the word "Koschei".{{CiteNPC|npc=Brundt the Chieftain|quote=We do not even know if Koschei is his name, when we found him he had no memory, he was simply repeating that single word. [...] Well, it was a raiding party like any other. We had just struck one of the smaller northern islands to harvest supplies by combat, as our laws allow, when we saw a figure in the icey waters. As we were at least a 3 week sail from any port, and saw no other ships nearby, he must have been there some time. [...] He had no clothes or possessions with him, and seemed to have been burnt somehow before he had landed in the water.}} The Fremennik brought him back to [[Rellekka]] where they nursed him back to health, though he had lost all of his memories. After this, he successfully completed the Fremennik trials of adulthood and joined them.{{CiteNPC|npc=Brundt the Chieftain|quote=Anyway, we decided to bring him back to Rellekka, for he did not seem of good health or sound mind, and simply repeated the word Koschei over and over. Yrsa tended to him for many weeks, until one day it was as though a new soul had entered his burnt and broken body. He suddenly left her house one day, fully healed, and able to speak to us as though nothing had happened to him. He still had no recollection of how he had come to be in the icey ocean, or of who he was, or where he had come from, but this did not matter to us or him. He took his trials of adulthood, as you did, and has been a boon to our clan ever since.}} In combat, he is a fierce warrior, able to rapidly heal from wounds and instantly learn from any combat technique used against him, which is why he was given the title "The Deathless". However, he is weakened by the daylight; a battleground beneath Rellekka was built so he can train his combat skills in peace.{{CiteNPC|npc=Thorvald the Warrior|quote=We named him 'The Deathless' because he is seemingly unkillable! Any combat technique used against him, he learns instantly! He also apparently can heal himself from any wound at will! When he attacks, his weapon moves like a whirlwind! He can hide his combat level from his opponents at will as well! He is truly a horribly fierce opponent to face! I am only glad that he has chosen to stay here with us! The daylight makes him feel weak, so we have built him his own battleground beneath this building, where he can train his fiercesome skills without being disturbed.|loc=The Fremennik Trials}}

==Strategy==
A [[ring of recoil]] can be an aid in killing the fourth form. When he hits, he always hits for 1 [[Hitpoint]], but at a rate of 1 hit every 0.6 seconds, and due to the rounding-up of the ring of recoil, would always hit him back for 1 at the same attack rate. Note, however, that a player would have to bring several rings of recoil, because each can only reflect 40 Hitpoints. If the only source of damage dealt is from the ring of recoil, he will despawn and cause a reset on the fight instead of moving onto the next form.

Low-levelled players may find his third and fourth form rather difficult, so a [[gnome amulet]] or [[combat bracelet]] is '''strongly''' advised, for it will provide a little protection (do not wear a [[ring of life]], or you will most likely have to start over again if your Hitpoints get too low).

There are certain [[safespots]] in Koschei's basement, such as the pillars of fire, or the many chasms in the ground. Players need only run quickly over to one side of a hole, and because Koschei only moves at a walking speed, players should be at one end of a hole long before he reaches the other end. However, '''do not''' stay in a safespot for too long, or Koschei will disappear and you will have to fight him all over again. It is also '''strongly''' advised that players bring high-healing food, such as [[monkfish]] or [[sharks]], as in his third and fourth form he hits progressively harder and quicker. Also, it appears that if you take too long fighting Koschei (10 minutes in the same phase), he will simply disappear and you will have to start the challenge all over again. It is interesting to note that, if you manage kill him three times, decide to try and kill him a fourth time, but find yourself unable to, the trial will still be deemed as a success. Once your Hitpoints reach 1, the player will kneel down and be transported back to Thorvald, who will still give them his vote.

It '''is''' possible to bring certain weapons into Koschei's chamber: [[Treasure Trails]] [[Treasure Trails#Possible rewards|caskets]] can be brought into the arena, and may yield weapons and/or armour. The mystery box may also be brought into the arena. Bear in mind that items '''cannot be dropped inside the arena''', so if you inventory is full and you must make space in it to pick up the rewards from the casket that will have dropped to the ground, you will have to eat food to make that space. It has not yet been tested whether trying to make inventory space by climbing the ladder back up, dropping items outside and coming back down will make the dropped rewards disappear.

Note that if players die on his first, second, or third form, they will die a normal death and lose their items - players can only die to his fourth form to get the vote. [[Hardcore ironmen]] and [[hardcore group ironmen]] only need to be concerned about dying to the first 3 forms. Losing to his fourth form will not actually kill the player; a small cutscene ends the fight when you are about to lose to the fourth form. It is possible to [[flinch]] Koschei by standing on either the south or north tile of one of the torches in the room while Koschei is east or west of the same torch. Koschei should stay on the same tile for each of his phases.

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 20 January 2021
|update = Puro-Puro Improvements and Barbarian Assault Changes
|change = [[Spoils of war]] can no longer be opened in [[Glarial's Tomb]] and the arena where players fight Koschei the deathless.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 9 August 2018
|update = Looting Bag Improvements, PID Changes and Bounty Hunter Targets
|change =
* Shop packs will no longer be permitted in situations where certain item restrictions apply, specifically Glarial's Tomb and the Koschei fight, lest they contain something that would otherwise be forbidden.
* Rune pouches can now be taken into Glarial's Tomb and the Koschei fight if they do not contain any runes.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 6 February 2014
|update = Quick-prayers & Loot Broadcast
|change = After Koschei the Deathless drained your prayer in [[Fremennik Trials]], players could simply restore it and re-activate their prayers. Koschei now keeps it drained.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
[[File:Koschei the deathless safespot.png|thumb|right|A player killing Koschei the deathless using Ranged.]]
*Koschei has many traits (including the trait of being hard to kill) that are similar to that of the {{wp|Koschei|Russian legend}} of the same name. However, in this legend, Koschei's soul was in a needle, inside an egg, inside a duck, inside a hare, inside an iron chest, which was buried under a green oak tree, which is on the island of Buyan, in the ocean. The only way to defeat him was if the egg or the needle was broken, and in some legends it has to be done on Koschei's forehead.
**Part of the real-life legend is referenced by Thorvald the Warrior when asking him about Koschei during The Fremennik Trials, where Thorvald claims one legend as to how Koschei cannot be killed is because he hid his heart inside a duck's egg.{{CiteNPC|npc=Thorvald the Warrior|quote=Some say he cannot die, for he has hidden his heart outside of his body to be kept forever safe in a duck egg.|loc=The Fremennik Trials}}
*He has a [[Zamorak]] symbol on his chest. However, his relation to the god is unknown. In ''RuneScape 3'', however, it is later revealed that he is a [[Mahjarrat]] named [[Kharshai]].
*Koschei's name is spelled Коще́й Бессме́ртный (Koschéi Bessmértny) in Russia where he is a popular figure in its folklore. As is usual in Russian transliterations, there are numerous other spellings. The spelling in other Slavic languages (like Polish "Kościej", Czech "Kostěj") suggests that his name may be derived from "kost" (rus. кость, pol. kość, cz. kost = bone); thus suggesting a skeleton-like appearance, which also indicates a possible connection with the Mahjarrat.
*He is the fastest attacking [[NPC]] in the game (in his final form with an attack speed of 1, meaning every 0.6 seconds), along with [[Scarab swarm]]s. The attack speed for his first three forms is 4 (2.4 seconds), the same as unarmed combat.
*Even though he has no combat level, his stats would give him a combat level of 25 for his first form, 48 for his second, 71 for his third, and 212 for his fourth. His true combat level is revealed in [[The Fremennik Exiles]], where he is shown to have a combat level of 142.
